description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a slim, matte black bezel. The screen sits atop a circular, sturdy pedestal stand that connects to the rear of the monitor via a rectangular support arm. The rear surface is smooth and unadorned, with a subtle angular contouring that adds a modern touch. The monitor is thin when viewed from the side, emphasizing its contemporary, space-saving design. No physical buttons, ports, or branding are visible on any side, giving it a minimalist and streamlined appearance. The overall color scheme is a uniform black, contributing to its professional and unobtrusive look.
description: A slim, black flat-panel computer monitor with a circular pedestal stand and a minimalist, bezel-framed display. The design is modern, with no visible buttons, ports, or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, black display framed by a thin bezel and the circular base directly beneath the screen.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the monitor's thin profile and the depth of the circular stand, with the support arm visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a smooth, unmarked back panel with a rectangular support arm connecting to the circular base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the monitor and the unobtrusive stand design.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, matte black, and uniform in thickness on all sides, with sharp corners and no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base with a rectangular support arm, both in matte black, appearing solid and stable with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
